title: Feature flags: add evaluator and route
head: martinshub-tech:feature/feature-flags
body:
Adds a feature‑flag system with evaluator, helper, config, API route, and tests. Enables safe rollout of risky changes such as Soroban submission.

- lib/flags/evaluator.ts
- lib/flags/requireFlag.ts
- config/feature-flags.json
- app/api/feature-flags/route.ts
- __tests__/flags/evaluator.test.ts

All changes covered by unit tests (over 95% coverage) and include caching for performance.
